zh.South Petherton, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓
zh.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Thweng於大約1309年出生在英國越可爾吉爾頓時，她的父親Marmaduke de Thweng62歲，母親Isabel de Ros34歲。她於1346年2月8日之前與Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1374年5月28日之前在英國。

zh-hans.South Petherton, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓
zh-hans.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特吉爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Thweng于大约1309年出生在英国越可爾吉爾頓时，她的父亲Marmaduke de Thweng62岁，母亲Isabel de Ros34岁。她于1346年2月8日之前与Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1374年5月28日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Thweng was born about 1309, in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Marmaduke de Thweng, was 62 and her mother, Isabel de Ros, was 34. She married Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny before 8 February 1346, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 28 May 1374, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Thweng est née environ 1309, à Kilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Marmaduke de Thweng, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Ros, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny avant 8 février 1346, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 28 mai 1374, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Thweng um 1309 in Kilton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Marmaduke de Thweng 62 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Ros 34. Sie hat vor 8. Februar 1346 in Somerset, England Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 28. Mai 1374 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Thweng è nata il circa 1309 nel Kilton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Marmaduke de Thweng, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Ros, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny prima del 8 febbraio 1346, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 28 maggio 1374, nel England.

ja.Kilton Castle, Cleveland, Yorkshire, Eng: イギリスヨークシュアイアキルトン
ja.South Petherton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトン
ja.Kilton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトキルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Thwengが約1309年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Marmaduke de Thwengは62歳，母Isabel de Rosは34歳であった。1346年2月8日以前にイギリスソメルセトでRalph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubenyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1374年5月28日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Thweng(이)가 대략 1309년 영국 요르크실르 킬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Marmaduke de Thweng(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Ros(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1346년 2월 8일 이전 영국 서머세트에서 Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1374년 5월 28일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1309–before 28 May 1374: ойролцоогоор 1309 он–1374 оны Тавдугаар сарын 28–наас өмнө
mn.South Petherton, Somerset, England: South Petherton, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Thweng nasceu aproximadamente 1309, em Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marmaduke de Thweng, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Ros, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny antes 8 de fevereiro de 1346, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 28 de maio de 1374, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Thweng родилась около 1309 г. в местности килтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Marmaduke de Thweng было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Ros, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny перед 8 февраль 1346 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 28 май 1374 г. в местности Англия.

sm.about 1309–before 28 May 1374: e tusa o le 1309–a'e le'I oo le 28 Me 1374

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Thweng nació aproximadamente 1309, en Kilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Marmaduke de Thweng, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Isabel de Ros, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny antes de 8 de febrero de 1346, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 28 de mayo de 1374, en Inglaterra.
